album.title: Album
album.empty:
You haven't taken any photos
for this album yet.
album.noselection: Pick a photo to read its little story.
album.randomnote: A quiet snapshot from your walk. There are no field notes for this one.
settings.title: Settings
confirm.deletephoto: Are you sure you want to delete this photo?
confirm.incomplete: You still have {n} photos left to take. Are you sure you want to finish now?
hud.controltip: Press SPACE to raise your camera. When you are happy with your roll, press Confirm to finish.
dialog.hint: click or press space to go on ▸
camera.hint: Take your aim, then click to snap the photo. Press space or right-click to lower the camera.
camera.rollfull: Your roll is full. Lower the camera to delete a photo and free up some room.
result.title: How you did
